Appearances:
Plaintiff Laramar Urban Specialty Partners is present. Represented by Jerry Deal.
Attorney Curtis Dowling appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Russie Manlangit is present.
Attorney Jennifer DMarco representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 525, for settlement discussions.

This case settled per the settlement attorney.
The trial date of NOV-21-2011 is vacated.
